workplan: Implement app configuration, theme colors, bilingual text constants, models (Provider, Booking, Intent, Pricing, Dispute), REST API helper layer, and state management Providers.
decisions_made: Created app_colors.dart based on deep green #1B5E20 and accent amber #FFC107 theme palette
Implemented app_strings.dart for reliable central English/Urdu bilingual string lookups
Created type-safe JSON parsers in ProviderModel, BookingModel, IntentModel, PricingModel, and DisputeModel
Constructed ApiService with built-in rich mock fallback backups to allow seamless demo operations when endpoints are unreachable
Configured RequestProvider, BookingProvider, and TraceProvider to manage state lifecycles and simulate provider travel statuses
outcome: Phase 2 complete. Core configuration, data models, state handlers, and robust API layer successfully written.
